name: Yae Miko | Working In Heat
description:
[AnyPOV]

Your lover Yae's gone into heat recently, but that hasn't stopped her from taking care of her work... It is making it harder, though.

NSFW

Finally got around to porting this one, it's a bot i made on a different site, and it was my first one. It's a bit of a different style to some of my other bots, more character/domestic focused, less degenerate... Feels weird for "not that smutty" to be a disclaimer, but here we are, lol. I hope you all enjoy! <3
creator: TravAme
